0.content:
# 👥 Active Directory — Group Modifications
Monitors group membership changes including when they occurred and who performed them. Covers adds (4728/4732/4756) and removals (4729/4733/4757) plus group attribute changes (4735/4737).

2.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4728") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4732") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4756")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

4.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4729") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4733") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4757")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

6.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4728") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4732") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4756")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:WhichAccountCompletedTheAdd EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:WhichDomain EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:WhoWasAdded EOL
DATA 'Group Name:\t\t' DATA:AddedToWhatGroup EOL"""
| filter WhoWasAdded != "-\n"
| filter contains(AddedToWhatGroup, "Domain Admins") OR contains(AddedToWhatGroup, "Enterprise Admins") OR contains(AddedToWhatGroup, "Schema Admins")
| summarize event_count = count()

8.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4735") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4737")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

10.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4728") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4732") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4756") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4729") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4733") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4757")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| fieldsAdd EventType = if(winlog.eventid == "4728" OR winlog.eventid == "4732" OR winlog.eventid == "4756", "Member Added", else: "Member Removed")
| makeTimeseries count(), by: EventType, time:{timestamp}, interval:5m

12.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4728") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4732") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4756")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:WhichAccountCompletedTheAdd EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:WhichDomain EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:WhoWasAdded EOL
DATA 'Group Name:\t\t' DATA:AddedToWhatGroup EOL"""
| filter WhoWasAdded != "-\n"
| fields timestamp, WhoWasAdded, AddedToWhatGroup, WhichAccountCompletedTheAdd, WhichDomain
| sort timestamp desc

14.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4729") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4733") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4757")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:WhichAccountCompletedTheDelete EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:WhichDomain EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:WhoWasRemoved EOL
DATA 'Group Name:\t\t' DATA:RemovedFromGroup EOL"""
| filter WhoWasRemoved != "-\n"
| fields timestamp, WhoWasRemoved, RemovedFromGroup, WhichAccountCompletedTheDelete, WhichDomain
| sort timestamp desc

16.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4728") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4732") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4756")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:WhichAccountCompletedTheAdd EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:WhichDomain EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:WhoWasAdded EOL
DATA 'Group Name:\t\t' DATA:GroupName EOL"""
| filter WhoWasAdded != "-\n"
| summarize MemberAdds = count(), by:GroupName
| sort MemberAdds desc

18.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4728") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4732") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4756") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4729") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4733") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4757")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL"""
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| summarize ChangeCount = count(), by:PerformedBy
| sort ChangeCount desc
